# SuperStatus

> SuperStatus is clean, modern, self-hostable status-page software. Run your own
> public status page — HTTP/TCP/keyword and AI/LLM checks, SLAs, an
> incident timeline, alerts to Slack/Discord/Telegram/email/webhooks, custom
> branding and light/dark — on infrastructure you own. Free forever to self-host
> (Docker), with one-click updates from the console; a managed cloud tier is planned.

## What it is

- Open-source status-page software (BUSL-1.1 licensed) you host yourself.
- A public status page your users can check, plus an operator console to manage
  status checks, incidents, branding, and alerting.
- Built on .NET / Blazor and PostgreSQL; ships as Docker images and runs with a
  single `docker compose up`.

## Key features

- Checks of every kind, each on its own schedule with per-service history:
  HTTP / TCP / keyword probes and AI/LLM canaries against any OpenAI-compatible
  endpoint (time-to-first-token + throughput).
- SLAs: per-service uptime targets and slow-response thresholds that drive the
  day colours and published 30-day uptime.
- Incident timeline, including optional AI-drafted incident summaries.
- Alerting to Slack, Discord, Telegram, email (SMTP), browser Web Push, and any
  outbound webhook — routed through per-check alert profiles, with recovery
  notices and optional auto-incidents.
- Self-serve updates: update from the console with one click or a nightly
  schedule, no server access required.
- Fully ownable: custom branding (title, logo, accent), light & dark themes,
  no vendor lock-in, export-friendly.

## Get started

- Self-host (one-liner): `curl -fsSL https://superstatus.superstatus.io/install.sh | sh`
- Landing & docs: https://superstatus.superstatus.io/
- Source code: https://github.com/teriansilva/superstatus

## Pricing (cloud tiers planned)

- Self-host: €0 / forever — run it on your own infrastructure, unlimited checks, full source.
- SuperStatus Cloud: from €9 / month — we host, update, and back it up, with TLS and a custom domain.
- SuperStatus Cloud Pro: from €29 / month — adds managed AI (incident drafts and summaries we
  run on your behalf) and worldwide monitoring (agents that ping your services from many regions,
  not just one location), plus more checks, history, team seats, and priority support.

## Contact

- Project home: https://superstatus.superstatus.io/
